# Sightlines

> Sightlines is a private-by-design exhibition planning tool for scaled room layouts, wall elevations, artwork placement, and simple 3D preview.

Sightlines is built for curators, exhibition planners, preparators, artists, and small gallery or museum teams. The app is browser-first and local-first: no account is required in v1, project data stays on the user's device, and uploaded artwork images are stored locally in browser storage.

Primary URL: https://sightlines.art/
Application URL: https://app.sightlines.art/
Canonical category: professional productivity software for exhibition, gallery, museum, and art-installation planning.

Reference pages:

- [Privacy](https://sightlines.art/privacy)
- [Security](https://sightlines.art/security)
- [IT access notes](https://sightlines.art/it)

Security and privacy notes:

- HTTPS-only production deployment on both hostnames.
- No hosted user projects or artwork images in v1.
- Optional cloud backup goes directly from the user's browser to their own Dropbox app folder; Sightlines never receives project data.
- No executable downloads.
- App analytics are consent-controlled: Cloudflare Web Analytics plus predefined aggregate product events, excluding project and artwork content. This informational site uses cookie-less Cloudflare Web Analytics without a prompt. No advertising, cross-site tracking, or personal profiles on either hostname.
- Application: static Vite React app on Cloudflare Workers static assets at app.sightlines.art.
- This site: static Astro informational site at sightlines.art.
